Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.types

Class SOOPLiveInfo

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop.types.SOOPLiveInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
LiveInfo
public class SOOPLiveInfo extends Object implements LiveInfo
SOOP live broadcast information model.
Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Details

    • SOOPLiveInfo

      public SOOPLiveInfo(boolean online, int result, String streamerId, String nickname, String title, String broadcastNo, int minTier)
      Creates a live information model.
      Parameters:
      online - live status resolved from SOOP live detail
      result - SOOP result code from live detail API
      streamerId - streamer user ID
      nickname - streamer display name
      title - broadcast title
      broadcastNo - broadcast numeric identifier
      minTier - minimum required subscription tier for chat access

  • Method Details

    • isLive

      public boolean isLive()
      Returns whether the broadcast is live.
      Specified by:
      isLive in interface LiveInfo
      Returns:
      true if the stream is online

    • isOnline

      public boolean isOnline()
      Returns whether the broadcast is online.
      Returns:
      true if the stream is online

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns broadcast title.
      Specified by:
      getTitle in interface LiveInfo
      Returns:
      live title

    • getResult

      public int getResult()
      Returns raw SOOP live-detail result code.
      Returns:
      API result code

    • getStreamerId

      public String getStreamerId()
      Returns streamer user ID.
      Returns:
      streamer ID

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns streamer nickname.
      Returns:
      streamer display name

      public String getBroadcastNo()
      Returns broadcast number value.
      Returns:
      broadcast number string

    • getMinTier

      public int getMinTier()
      Returns minimum subscription tier required by the broadcast.
      Returns:
      minimum tier value, or 0 when unrestricted
